title: MythrOS Foundry Bridge
description: MythrOS ⇄ Foundry VTT (dnd5e) bridge for KoTT.gg / Ashreach: two-way chat + dice-roll relay, HP/economy live sync, account provisioning, MythrOS combat augmentation (hidden monster HP, async turn-prep declarations, permadeath), AND combat mirror — a Foundry fight mirrors into the live Discord combat tracker (turns, HP, death saves, turn-prep, permadeath write-through) over one socket. D&D 5e only.
